reasoning: The Indiana Pacers have roughly a 3% implied probability to win the Central Division based on betting odds (+3000). The underlying fundamentals driving these long odds are extremely compelling: their franchise player, Tyrese Haliburton, suffered an Achilles tear in the 2025 Finals and is expected to miss the entire 2025-26 season. Furthermore, starting center Myles Turner departed in free agency to the division-rival Bucks. Given these significant roster downgrades, experts project the Cavaliers, Pistons, and Bucks to finish ahead of them. The probability is therefore set to the lower end, around 4%.
batch_queries: Will the Indiana Pacers win the 2025–2026 NBA Central Division?
